query.text:
declare @master varchar(32), @prime varchar(32), @inquiry varchar(32), @ma_ct varchar(32), @PrimeJoin varchar(4000), @PrimeFilter nvarchar(4000) if (@vc_type = '2') select @master = @@master, @prime = @@prime, @inquiry = @@inquiry, @ma_ct = @@id else select @master = 'c51$000000', @prime = 'm51$', @inquiry = 'i51$', @ma_ct = 'PC1', @$primeJoin = replace(@$primeJoin, '56', '51')
select @PrimeJoin = 'left join ' + @prime + '%Partition b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec', @PrimeFilter = '' if @$primeJoin <> '' select @PrimeJoin = @PrimeJoin + ' ' + @$primeJoin if @$primeFilter <> '' select @PrimeFilter = @PrimeFilter + case when @PrimeFilter <> '' then ' and ' else '' end + @$primeFilter
exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Finding @ma_ct, @master, @prime, @inquiry, @@partition, @@expression, @@increase, @@extension, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @@keyMaster, @@keyDetail, 'stt_rec', @@textList, @@textExternal, 'a left join dmkh b on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh', @@textOrderBy, @@admin, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, @so_ct1, @so_ct2, '2', @user_id0, @ma_dvcs, default, default, default, default, default, default, 'a.', @PrimeJoin, @PrimeFilter
